name: reprorelay
description: Open-source client bug capture, GitHub issue sync, and AI agent handoff.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @reprorelay/shared && npm run build -w @reprorelay/agent-adapters && npm run build -w @reprorelay/browser-sdk && npm run build -w @reprorelay/github && npm run build -w @reprorelay/react && npm run build -w @reprorelay/worker
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @reprorelay/api && npm run build -w @reprorelay/dashboard && npm run build -w @reprorelay/react-demo
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build -w @reprorelay/shared && npm run build -w @reprorelay/agent-adapters && npm run build -w @reprorelay/github && npm run build -w @reprorelay/worker && npm run build -w @reprorelay/browser-sdk && npm run build -w @reprorelay/dashboard && npm run build -w @reprorelay/api
